mayor_city_a_greeting: Greetings, citizen. As {npc_rank} of {city_name}, I oversee our local administration.
We coordinate regional charter policies, tax updates, and regulatory sponsor projects here.
How can I assist you today?
clerk_city_a_greeting: Welcome to the local administration chambers. I am {npc_name}, {npc_rank}.
I keep records of regional contracts, citizen petitions, and active quest listings.
Would you like to review the local Quest Board?
burgomeister_town_a_1_greeting: Greetings, citizen. As {npc_rank} of {city_name}, I oversee our local administration.
We coordinate regional charter policies, tax updates, and regulatory sponsor projects here.
How can I assist you today?
clerk_town_a_1_greeting: Welcome to the local administration chambers. I am {npc_name}, {npc_rank}.
I keep records of regional contracts, citizen petitions, and active quest listings.
Would you like to review the local Quest Board?
councilor_city_a_greeting: Ah, welcome, traveler. I am {npc_name}, {npc_rank} of the council.
Here at the Lawhouse, we vote on regional edicts and hear sponsors.
Would you like to manage council votes or complete active quests?
scribe_city_a_greeting: Welcome to the local administration chambers. I am {npc_name}, {npc_rank}.
I keep records of regional contracts, citizen petitions, and active quest listings.
Would you like to review the local Quest Board?
guildmaster_patreon_greeting: Welcome to the Patreon Guild Hall, citizen.
I manage professional rank advancements here.
Do you or your hired employees have a breakthrough rank trial to request?
chairman_patreon_greeting: Greetings, citizen. I am the Grand Chairman of the conclave.
Here we coordinate political campaigns, seasonal council seat elections, and regulatory audits.
How can I assist you in conclave politics today?
overseer_patreon_greeting: Greetings, citizen. I am the Donations Overseer for the guild.
You can donate Gold or commodity stockpiles to elevate our province's prosperity.
Would you like to make a donation?
steward_patreon_greeting: Greetings, merchant. I am the Materials Steward.
I authorize the purchase of wholesale material bundles when province prosperity milestones are reached.
Would you like to review available timed bundles?

worker_lazy_complaints: Ugh, another shift? I need a break...
Why does the boss expect us to work so fast anyway?
If you need me, I'll be taking my third lunch break.
worker_eager_dialogue: Ready for duty, boss! What are we crafting next?
I love the smell of workshops in the morning!
No task is too big for our team! Let's get to work!
worker_grumble_dialogue: Working all day and night for a handful of gold...
I hope there's an overtime bonus in the salary this week.
Sure, I'll craft it. But it's going to cost you.
